title: Diddles design feedback — blurred issues, gradient name, Cloudflare nameservers
html:
Diddles sends design feedback on the Rankett tool + website: add blurred "detected issues" teasers, more legitimacy stats on the overview page, rename "write blog posts" to obfuscated jargon ("create linked content in discovery channels"), gradient the brand name like the "rank your business" header, move the "AI is a tidal wave" piece above the 4 boxes. Same thread: HighSend asks for Cloudflare nameservers (kolton.ns.cloudflare.com, roxy.ns.cloudflare.com) on the domain.

TL;DR

  • Diddles product-direction notes for Rankett: progress-memory in the tool, gradient branding, jargon-disguised deliverables to feel premium.
  • Cloudflare nameserver migration request from HighSend partner.
  • Design pattern: hide the work behind opaque language so prospects can't self-fulfill.

rankett · diddles · cloudflare · ghost white label · ai visibility engine
